name: TalkJS
description: TalkJS — Embeddable chat UI SDK for adding in-app conversations to web applications with hosted backend.

seo.title: TalkJS — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: TalkJS: TalkJS — Embeddable chat UI SDK for adding in-app conversations to web applications with hosted backend.

when_to_use: Embeddable chat UI for marketplace messaging feature
Hosted chat backend with pre-built React components
In-app messaging for B2B SaaS collaboration tools
Multi-tenant chat with conversation history API

pros: Pre-built chat UI saves weeks of frontend work
Hosted backend handles scaling and storage
Clean pricing tied to MAUs and features
Good for marketplaces and multi-party chat
cons: UI customization bounded by their theming model
Hosted-only — no self-host for sensitive data
Costs climb fast at higher MAU tiers
Less flexible than raw chat SDKs for exotic UX
review.verdict: Fastest way to ship decent-looking in-app chat; accept the UI constraints and the hosted-only model.
review.best_for: Marketplaces and SaaS products adding hosted in-app chat quickly
review.not_for: Teams needing self-hosted chat or highly custom messaging UX
